providers.description: Direct Videasy API resolver for Cineplay, Cineby, and legacy embed frontends
notes: Current CLI implementation uses the direct api.videasy.to payload/decryption path only.
Cineplay (bc-frontend) is the default Videasy client profile; vidking.net remains an override.
If the direct payload is unavailable
the CLI fails fast instead of leasing a browser.
Do not mark browser-safe because the implementation depends on local WASM assets and Node runtime behavior.

providers.description: Browserless VidLink resolver for movies and series — direct HLS with multi-language subtitles, no captcha or session token
notes: Browserless: TMDB id is encrypted via enc-dec.app
then sources are fetched from vidlink.pro/api/b.
Returns a multi-quality HLS playlist (mpv selects the rendition) plus provider subtitles.
External dependency: relies on enc-dec.app for the id-encryption step; falls back to other providers if it is unavailable.
Bypasses Playwright entirely by generating the 32-bit MurmurHash signature natively in Node.js.

providers.description: AllManga-compatible anime API client (sub & dub, no browser needed)
notes: AllManga-compatible client uses local fetch/decode logic for search
The active CLI path is browserless; unsupported extracted embeds should return deterministic failure.

providers.description: Miruro anime direct resolver (pipe API + XOR decrypt)
notes: Uses miruro.tv pipe API with XOR/gzip decryption key 71951034f8fbcf53d89db52ceb3dc22c.
Sources from vault-10.uwucdn.top CDN with referer from stream payload.
May hit Cloudflare rate limits if called too frequently.

featureStatus.label: Terminal shell
featureStatus.description: Persistent Ink shell with search, playback, and recovery workflows.

featureStatus.label: Direct provider resolution
featureStatus.description: HTTP scrapers in packages/providers without browser automation.

featureStatus.label: mpv playback
featureStatus.description: Kunai resolves streams; mpv is the playback engine.

featureStatus.label: kunai:// share links
featureStatus.description: Catalog-anchored share URLs via /share, /watch, kunai --open, and mpv hotkey.

featureStatus.label: History continuation
featureStatus.description: Continue unfinished titles from History with catalog bounds and source preference.

featureStatus.label: Provider endpoint health
featureStatus.description: Local health memory, /recompute bypass, and /reset-provider-health recovery.

featureStatus.label: Network status indicator
featureStatus.description: Shell header shows connectivity; offline mode is explicit, never silent.

featureStatus.label: Diagnostics export
featureStatus.description: /diagnostics panel and redacted /export-diagnostics with DB-backed recent export.

featureStatus.label: AniList / TMDB sync
featureStatus.description: Opt-in account sync for watch state and metadata.

featureStatus.label: Notifications inbox
featureStatus.description: Shell notifications for downloads, playback, and setup guidance.

featureStatus.label: Discord Rich Presence
featureStatus.description: Opt-in social status integration; off by default until configured.

featureStatus.label: Offline downloads
featureStatus.description: Queue downloads and play completed artifacts without provider calls.

featureStatus.label: Persistent offline mode
featureStatus.description: Configurable local-only shell mode separate from the --offline launch flag.

featureStatus.label: Download quality floor
featureStatus.description: Shared quality policy for download jobs via defaultDownloadQuality setting.

featureStatus.label: User-owned provider geo relay
featureStatus.description: Optional metadata/API relay template for geo-blocked providers; video remains direct.

featureStatus.label: install.sh / install.ps1
featureStatus.description: OS installer scripts for global Bun package setup.

featureStatus.label: Browser / Playwright providers
featureStatus.description: Archived reference only; not part of active beta runtime.

featureStatus.label: Hosted stream relay
featureStatus.description: No Kunai-operated video proxy or hosted transcoding in beta v1.
